untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific pattern structures (buying climax, reversal bar, failed test) and higher timeframe confirmation logic that cannot be expressed with available indicators alone. Pattern recognition and multi-timeframe analysis require custom logic beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. Signal also lacks specific RSI threshold values and pattern confirmation bar counts.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using RSI overextension (RSI <30 for longs, >70 for shorts) combined with large body candles (body_pct >0.7) and reversal price action (close beyond prev high/low) as proxies for pattern extremes and reversal bars. However, the core requirement for structural pattern confirmation and higher timeframe bias validation cannot be fully captured. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition logic or providing specific pattern definitions and thresholds.
